signal_labels.stale_free: share of open work touched recently (not stale)
signal_labels.estimated: share of open work that carries an estimate
signal_labels.moving: share of open work whose state moved recently

owner_gap.note: 29 of 61 open epics have no individual owner (blank or parked on a role placeholder like Dev Lead/UIX Lead) — assign a person so someone is accountable.
